use_cases: Display loading state during async operations like data fetching or API calls
Indicate progress during form submissions or page transitions
Show background processing activity in dashboards and analytics tools
Provide visual feedback during media uploads or content loading
Signal that an operation is in progress in real-time collaboration features
ai_summary: A glass-morphism loading indicator featuring 8 animated ripple circles with gradient fills and backdrop blur effects. The component uses staggered CSS animations to create a mesmerizing pulse effect suitable for any loading state across web and mobile applications.
